title: Partner onboardings
subtitle: The pipeline that makes From Day 1 an industry standard — not just another tool.

board.title: Pipeline
board.subtitle: Change a partner's status to move it forward. Click a card for the full detail.

method.title: The method
method.subtitle: Five non-negotiable principles, applied to every partnership.

activable.title: Activable within 6 months
activable.desc: If the first onboarded artist arrives after M+6, the deal is not worth the energy.

owner.title: One named owner
owner.desc: One person, one partner. No diluted responsibility, no orphaned deal.

metrics.title: Clear metrics
metrics.desc: Every partnership has its M+3 / M+9 / M+18 targets written before signing.

pilot.title: Pilot first
pilot.desc: Prove the value on a small scope before generalizing. Never the other way around.

exclusivity.title: Exclusivity a posteriori
exclusivity.desc: Exclusivity is earned with results — it is never granted at signature.

believe.name: Believe
believe.brings: Thousands of distributed artists, instant market credibility
believe.weBring: White-label analytics + French rights layer, 25% rev-share
believe.nextAction: Warm intro Ismaël Kané — scope the 500-artist pilot
believe.pitch: Believe distributes, From Day 1 makes artists stay. Their artist churn comes from the lack of consolidated visibility: we plug our analytics + French rights layer into their portal, white-label, 25% rev-share. Pilot on 500 artists from their French roster, activable in 90 days via warm intro Ismaël Kané. Believe gains retention, we gain the most powerful distribution channel in France.
believe.m3: Pilot signed, 500 artists from the French roster onboarded
believe.m9: Activation rate > 60%, measurable drop in Believe churn
believe.m18: Extension to the whole French roster, official co-marketing

r1.risk: Believe internalizes and builds its own layer
r1.mitigation: Long product cycles on their side — lock a 12-month exclusive pilot before their next budget cycle

r2.mitigation: Offer a free pilot capped at 90 days; negotiation starts after the proof

r3.mitigation: Cap Believe at 40% of partner signups, diversify ADAMI + schools in parallel

adami.name: ADAMI
adami.weBring: AI translation of statements, modernized member portal
adami.nextAction: Meeting with digital directorate — statement translation demo
adami.pitch: ADAMI's member portal is aging and its statements remain unreadable for most of its 50,000 members. We offer AI translation of statements into plain language, embedded in their member area. ADAMI modernizes its service with zero R&D, we gain access to the largest pool of performers in France.
adami.m3: Demo validated by the digital directorate, pilot on 1,000 members
adami.m9: Statement translation live in the member area
adami.m18: Co-branded From Day 1 offer proposed to all members

r1.mitigation: Internal sponsor in the digital directorate + pilot with no legal commitment

r2.mitigation: Processing in France, DPA from the pilot onward, no data resold

sacem.name: SACEM
sacem.brings: Maximum credibility, author rights data at the source
sacem.weBring: A modern tracking interface for their members
sacem.nextAction: Map innovation contacts — target the partner program
sacem.pitch: SACEM is the final boss: nobody pitches author rights in France without them. We are not chasing a short-term commercial deal but a seat in their innovation program — being the modern interface their members are asking for. Every quarter of institutional presence raises the barrier for a US entrant.
sacem.m3: Qualified contact inside the innovation program
sacem.m18: Institutional partnership or pilot member API

r1.mitigation: Build nothing that depends on SACEM before signature; treat it as a bonus

r2.risk: Perceived competition with their own tools
r2.mitigation: Position as a member companion, never as a replacement for their systems

bolero.name: Bolero / Anote
bolero.weBring: A flow of properly valued artists, proprietary valuation data
bolero.pitch: Bolero and Anote built the fractional investment rail for music — but their bottleneck is sourcing properly valued catalogs. We have real-time NPS × multiple valuation on every artist. We plug our flow into their rail: they gain qualified deal flow, we activate fractional V3 without building the regulated infrastructure.
bolero.m3: Exploratory call done, API scope defined
bolero.m18: Fractional rail integrated in the V3 product

r1.mitigation: Leave the regulatory risk with the regulated partner; stay a data provider

r2.risk: Deal volume too low to interest them
r2.mitigation: Arrive at the first call with 10 pre-valued, consenting catalogs

qonto.name: Qonto
qonto.weBring: A turnkey music vertical for their marketplace
qonto.pitch: Every artist who incorporates opens a business account — and Qonto wants industry verticals to differentiate. We become their music vertical: business account embedded in From Day 1, financial onboarding of artists on their side. They gain a growing creative segment, our artists gain a business account built for royalty flows.
qonto.m3: Listed on the Qonto partner marketplace
qonto.m9: Business account integrated in the From Day 1 onboarding
qonto.m18: 500 artist accounts opened through the partnership

r1.mitigation: Require API access from the pilot, not just a crossed logo

r2.risk: Shine / Revolut competing on the same segment
r2.mitigation: Stay non-exclusive until the integration is deep

mama.name: MaMA Festival
mama.brings: 6,000 pros and emerging artists gathered in Paris every October
mama.nextAction: Confirm booth + "read your statements" workshop for the October edition
mama.pitch: MaMA is three days when the entire French emerging music scene is in one place. We are its data partner: a "learn to read your statements" workshop, on-booth onboarding, a free Day 1 Index for every programmed artist. Controlled cost, direct harvest: hundreds of qualified artists leaving with their dashboard already filled.
mama.m3: Booth + workshop confirmed for the October edition
mama.m18: Official data partnership renewed, extension to Trans Musicales

r1.risk: Signup spike without retention after the event
r1.mitigation: Dedicated D+7 and D+30 activation journey for the festival cohort

r2.mitigation: Negotiate the data partnership against visibility rather than cash

schools.name: Music schools
schools.brings: Entire cohorts of future professionals every year
schools.weBring: Education licenses + turnkey "manage your career" module
schools.nextAction: Pitch the career module to CFA academic directors
schools.pitch: Every CFA or ICART cohort is a class of artists and managers who will form their tooling habits within 24 months. We equip schools with near-free education licenses and a ready-to-teach "manage your career" module. Students learn the business on From Day 1 — and keep it when they graduate.
schools.m3: 2 pilot schools equipped, career module tested in class
schools.m9: 5 active schools, first graduates converted to paid
schools.m18: Network of 15 schools, recurring annual signup pipeline

r1.risk: Sales cycle locked to the school year
r1.mitigation: Sign before June for a September start, otherwise aim for January

r2.risk: Low conversion from free licenses to paid
r2.mitigation: License limited to study duration + young graduate offer at exit
